case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS HOLLEY, JAMES K.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLEY, JAMES K. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLEY, JAMES K.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOLLEY, JAMES K. DISMISSED WITH ACTION. STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BARS THE ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED
